no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: FEAT-014 and FEAT-016 already contain explicit MET cross-references (`[[MET-001]]` and `[[MET-002]]`) in their Dependencies sections, so the requested content change is already present in the worktree. The blocking issue is the required `ddx doc audit --json --exit-zero`, which is not clean before any edits and reports pre-existing unrelated graph drift: a cycle `FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 -> FEAT-016 -> FEAT-020 -> MET-002 -> SD-013 -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002`, many duplicate document IDs under `.agents/skills/docs/`, and one missing dependency on `helix.workflow`. Fixing that baseline drift is outside the scope of this bead.
